zh.lifeSummary: 當Felicia Redman於大約1370年出生在英國越可爾希亞活時，她的父親Matthew IV Redman42歲，母親Joan Fitzhugh33歲。她於1407年與John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley在英國達勒姆格亞特 盧姆利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1418年在英國爾阿斯特伯里聖 馬也斯 邱奇享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Felicia Redman于大约1370年出生在英国越可爾希亞活时，她的父亲Matthew IV Redman42岁，母亲Joan Fitzhugh33岁。她于1407年与John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley在英国達勒姆格亞特 盧姆利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1418年在英国爾阿斯特伯里聖 馬也斯 邱奇享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Redman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English red (Old English hrēod) ‘reed’ + -man, presumably for a thatcher or reed-cutter. Compare Reeder .
English: in southeastern England sometimes a topographic name perhaps for someone who lived by a clearing, from Middle English rede (Old English rēod, rȳd) ‘clearing’ + man.
English: habitational name from Redmain (Cumberland), from Old English rēad ‘red’ + an uncertain second element, perhaps a dialect form of man ‘cairn’.

variants.name: Reeder
meanings: English: occupational name for someone who used reeds as a roofing material (a thatcher), a derivative of Middle English rede ‘reed’ + -er. Compare Reed and Redman .

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a clearing, a derivative of Middle English rede, ride, rude ‘clearing’ (see Reed ) + -er, synonymous and interchangeable with atte Rede, atte Rude ‘at the clearing’. This type of name, composed of a topographic term + -er, is common in Kent, Surrey and Sussex, and it is also found in Essex.
Dutch and German: variant of   Reder   3.

variants.name: Redhead
meanings: nickname for someone with red hair, from Middle English red ‘red’ + he(ve)d ‘head’. Compare Redman .
habitational name from an unidentified place in northern England called Redhead, probably meaning ‘red headland’.

variants.name: Rodman
meanings: English: occupational name for a thatcher or reed-cutter, from Southwest Middle English rod(e), rud(e) (Old English hrēod) ‘reed’ + -man. Synonymous with Redman 1.
English: topographic name for someone who lived at a clearing, from Middle English rode (Old English rodu) or Southwest Middle English rude (Old English rȳde) ‘clearing’ + man. See Redman 2.
Americanized form of German Rodmann: variant of Rodemann (see Rodeman ).

nameMeanings.name: Felicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Felix . It was popular in Britain in the medieval period (with the vernacular forms Felice , Felis ), but by the 16th century it had become confused with Phyllis . In modern times it is in only occasional use.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Felicia Redman was born about 1370, in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, her father, Matthew IV Redman, was 42 and her mother, Joan Fitzhugh, was 33. She married John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley in 1407, in Great Lumley, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1418, in Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire, England, at the age of 49.

fr.Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire,: Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Felicia Redman est née environ 1370, à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Matthew IV Redman, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Joan Fitzhugh, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley en 1407, à Great Lumley, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1418, à Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire,: Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Felicia Redman um 1370 in Harewood, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Matthew IV Redman 42 und ihre Mutter Joan Fitzhugh 33. Sie hat 1407 in Great Lumley, Durham, England John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1418 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Felicia Redman è nata il circa 1370 nel Harewood, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Matthew IV Redman, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Joan Fitzhugh, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley nel 1407, nel Great Lumley, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1418, nel Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Felicia Redmanが約1370年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドで生まれた時，父Matthew IV Redmanは42歳，母Joan Fitzhughは33歳であった。1407年にイギリスダルハムグレアト ルムリーでJohn Lumley 2nd Baron Lumleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1418年にイギリスチェシュアイアアストブリーサイント マリ'ス チャーチで49歳で死去した。

ko.Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire,: 영국 체실르 애스트버이 세인트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Felicia Redman(이)가 대략 1370년 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Matthew IV Redman(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Fitzhugh(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1407년 영국 뒤람 그리트 럼리에서 John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1418년 영국 체실르 애스트버이 세인트 마이'스 c후르치에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire,: Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Felicia Redman nasceu aproximadamente 1370, em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Matthew IV Redman, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Joan Fitzhugh, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley em 1407, em Great Lumley, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1418, em Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire,: сеинт мэри'с чурч, астбури, чешир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Felicia Redman родилась около 1370 г. в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Matthew IV Redman было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Fitzhugh, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley в 1407 г. в местности грит лумли, дурам, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1418 г. в местности сеинт мэри'с чурч, астбури, чешир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

Se casó con John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley en 1407, en Great Lumley, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1418, en Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años.
